# Fx64b.dev

> Personal website of Fabio Maffucci (Fx64b), a software engineer from
> Switzerland specializing in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Go, with a
> growing focus on cybersecurity. The site hosts his blog, project
> documentation, and a collection of free, privacy-friendly developer tools.

## About

- [Home](https://fx64b.dev/): Overview, featured projects, and tech stack.
- [Blog](https://fx64b.dev/blog): Articles on software development, technology, and lessons learned.
- [Projects](https://fx64b.dev/projects): Featured and other projects with documentation and source links.
- [Tools](https://fx64b.dev/tools): Free, browser-based developer tools (no ads, no tracking).

## Tools

- [Byte Converter](https://fx64b.dev/tools/byte-converter): Convert between byte units (KB, MB, GB, TB, etc.).
- [Text Case Converter](https://fx64b.dev/tools/text-case-converter): Convert text between cases.
- [Color Converter](https://fx64b.dev/tools/color-converter): Convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL.
- [Hour to Decimal Converter](https://fx64b.dev/tools/hour-decimal-converter): Convert hours and minutes to decimal time.
- [Character & Word Counter](https://fx64b.dev/tools/character-word-counter): Count characters, words, sentences, and reading time.

- GitHub: https://github.com/Fx64b
